Glazers
Example of the Month
This Top Secret sealed "S A D" packet with your
newsletter contains a complete %%Swipe A Deploy" Sample
of a tested, proven, universally applicable marketing item...
One month it may be a direct mail piece, another something to use at a
website, another a seasonal program, another a complete tele-seminar or
webinar campaign, etc. etc.
Our goal is to get as close to handing you a Turn-key, Ready-To-Use
Marketing/Promotional Tool as is possible, given there are literally thousands of
different kinds of businesses making Glazer-Kennedy Insider's Circle™
membership. To anyone who uses just one of these a year, this at least
QUADRUPLES THE VALUE OF MEMBERSHIP, and makes every month a quick-to-
moneymaking-action 	month.
I M P O RTA N T 	N O T E : 	T h e s e 	a r e 	i n t e n d e d 	O N LY 	f o r 	u s e 	o f 	G K I C
Members. 	Further, 	whenever 	possible, 	helpful 	vendors, 	suppliers 	or
facilitators 	will 	be 	provided 	should 	you 	wish 	to 	use 	them.
This 	month: 	I'm 	going 	to 	show 	you 	a 	marketing 	tool 	that 	has 	been 	around 	for
ages, and today is unjustly underused. In fact, I regret that I never used it when I
was operating my menswear stores and will tell you that anyone who is doing
business on a local level should strongly consider using it and in fact...I'm willing
to handsomely reward every GKIC Member who can demonstrate to me they
have* (more about that later).
But first, let me give you the back story. Earlier this year, Brace Ford (GKIC's
Executive Director of Marketing and Operations) and I traveled to New York to
attend 	the 	Direct 	Marketing Association 	Convention.

-- 1 of 9 --

While there, we walked around the vendor area, being on the lookout for new
GKIC vendors or people to connect with our Members. Of course the typical
suspects were there....printers, list brokers, book publishers, wiz-bang data base
companies, etc. etc.
1	*
But there was one vendor there that had a display of approximately 100 door
knobs with a different oversized DOOR HANGER hanging from each knob. This
made me STOP in my tracks and say to Brace that I've got to find out more
about what they are doing.
Now I know....Door Hangers are nothing new, but these were different. As I said
before, they were oversized, the graphics were spectacular and whoever was
putting them together understood the ONLY kind of marketing we teach at
Glazer-Kennedy (Direct Response where every dollar you spend is measurable and
accountable).
Best of all, using DOOR HANGERS costs a fraction of what direct mail costs per
piece and with it hanging on someone's front door it's likely to get noticed and
read. Especially when they look like these DOOR HANGERS (see example
included). I think you'll agree. 	1
Besides the actual door hanger example included, here is a small sampling of how
other business categories have successfully used door hangers:
Auto 	Repair
A 	Gift
For You

Front 	Back
The fact is...If you've got a local business, you can use door
hangers 	as 	a 	cost 	effective 	"New 	Customer Acquisition" 	media
Let me give you some Helpful Information and Creative Tips from PowerDirect,
the company that makes these available:
HELPFUL INFORMATION 	about 	services 	provided 	by
PowerDirect
• Complete Creative Services: copy development, design, and layout as needed
• High-quality printing like you see on the included sample
• Development of the targeted areas to distribute your door hangers
• Complete distribution with GPS tracking plus on-site auditing to make sure you door
hangers get delivered
• Sophisticated pre and post-campaign analytics to track results
• Typical minimum order is 50,000 door hangers, but if that's too much, you can distribute
them over time instead of all at once
CREATIVE TIPS
Think of the front of your door hanger as an outdoor billboard - the back as a print ad

-- 3 of 9 --

• Keep the front bold and simple - one big idea, with a 'call-to-action' selling line in 5-7
words or less.
• Save details for the back.
• Use bold lettering and bold colors with lots of white space.
• Make the front so compelling, it motivates the consumer to turn it over to read the details.
• Make sure your offer is strong - genuinely appealing and unusual.
• Sweeten the deal with a premium that the consumer can receive by acting ASAP.
• Use a specialty feature (scratch-off or perforated card) to heighten interest and encourage
involvement.
• Make it easy to respond: focus on one thing the consumer needs to do, i.e., make a quick
phone call, go online, visit a business, etc.
• Prod the consumer to act now by setting a deadline.
FAQ's From PowerDirect
What does the PowerDirect package include?
The PowerDirect package includes:
1) printing of super-jumbo, specialty door hangers.
2) national, solo distribution with 6PS-tracking and three levels of auditing, and
3) precise targeting for pre and post-campaign profiling and predictive modeling.
Does 	PowerDirect 	provide 	printing?
Yes, PowerDirect provides quality printing as an integral part of the package. To
assure the highest quality available, we require that all door hangers be both
printed and distributed by PowerDirect.
Does PowerDirect provide door hanger templates in custom sizes?
PowerDirect recommends using our super-sized 5.5" x 17" door hanger because its
high visibility generates high response rates. Superior quality four-color printing
on glossy cover stock Is standard.
Do you offer special features on the door hangers to make our direct
marketing 	campaign 	more 	effective?
Definitely. We provide many special features such as innovative die-cuts, scratch-
offs, affixed cards and magnet features. These features can be used very
effectively to drive consumers to your location or to generate response to a phone
number or website address.
If 	my 	door 	hangers 	are 	already 	printed, 	will 	PowerDirect 	distribute 	them?
Under most circumstances, PowerDirect is unable to distribute doorhangers which
have been printed by another provider. This is because a portion of the margin
from printing is used for additional distribution auditing. As a result, our
distribution system clearly surpasses others in our industry.
1	>

-- 4 of 9 --

Does PowerDirect require a minimum door hanger order?
We do. Under most circumstances, PowerDirect requires a minimum order of
50,000 door hangers. In this way, we generate economies of scale which help us
keep unit costs for major door hanger campaigns at acceptable levels.
Does 	PowerDirect 	provide 	direct 	mail 	also?
We do. PowerDirect originated as a door hanger advertising company, but early on,
we had many requests from clients to also execute their direct mail campaigns.
Since PowerDirect's top management had extensive experience in this discipline,
we soon added direct mail to our list of services. Today, direct mail is a major
percentage of our business.
Do you ever recommend combining door hangers and direct mail into a single
campaign?
Yes, we frequently encourage this integrated strategy for our clients, designing
campaigns that focus on delivering door hangers and direct mail in coordinated
waves. When both media are planned and coordinated as a single campaign by a
single supplier, the synergistic result generates a significantly higher response
rate. By using this unique package of door hangers and direct mail, marketers gain
exceptional direct response potential plus strong recall and branding capability.
How fast can PowerDirect get the job underway?
Because PowerDirect understands the importance of timely campaign schedules,
production proceeds quickly. Door hangers are typically in market within ten days
after we receive approved art.
What is the most important reason to choose PowerDirect to implement our
direct 	response 	marketing?
PowerDirect offers the most precise targeting and profiling, post-analysis and
predictive modeling for door-to-door marketing available today. Using the most
sophisticated analytical tools, we develop custom pre or post-campaign predictive
models based on current customer lists or campaign response data.
WHAT TO DO NEXT
Power Direct has offered a FREE Vi Hour Consultation to all GKIC Members who
call them before January 31st. You have the opportunity to chat with one of their
experts who can walk you through the entire process of Door-to-Door Marketing.
Check out the enclosed response form for more details and to take advantage of the
offer!

*REWARD: Try out these DOOR HANGERS in your business, send me a
sample along with actual results and the "3" Members who report the best stats
will each win FREE Registration to the 2010 SuperConferenceSM Bonus Day (A
FULL DA Y'S SHOWCASE of THE BEST & BRIGHTEST MEMBERS) competing for
GKIC Door Hanger Marketer of the Year. Plus...the winner of the three will win
THE WINNERS WEEKEND which includes a unique mastermind-group experience
led by Bill and Dan; lodging at a luxury resort in sunny Orlando, Florida; evening
dinners at special restaurants; informal networking; and round-trip airfare for the
winner and a companion.

Descubre
Kohl's y obten
de descuento en
cualquier compra
de $20 o mas
Para saber cual es la tienda de Kohl's mas cercana, llama al 1-800-837-1500 o visitanos en Kohls.com.
HAZ LAS COMPRAS EN NUESTRO AMPLIO HORARIO: Consulta los detalles en Kohls.com.
Por favor, envla tus preguntas o comentarios sobre la distribution de esta pieza a inquiries@powerdirect.net o llama al 877-253-5100.
de descuento
con cualquier compra
de $20 o mas
(jrealmente en todos!)
OFERTA VALIDA DEL LUNES 3 DE AGOSTO AL LUNES 7 DE SEPTIEMBRE DE 2009, EN LAS TIENDAS UNICAMENTE.
Oferta valida en las tiendas iWcamente con una compra minima de S20, con cualquier medio de pago. No se permite devolution
de efectivo. La oferta no es trahsferible y no puede canjearse por dinero en efectivo. Se puede canjear un solo cupon de S10 por
cliente. La oferta puede utilizarse en las mercancias con precio de oferta, regular o liquidation. La oferta no es valida para ajustes
de precio de compras antortofes, para comprarTarjetas de Obsequio, ni para realizar pagos en una cuenta de credito de Kohl's.
La oferta tampoco es valida para compras de mercancias de la linea Kohl's Cares for Kids ni otros articulos beneficos. El cupon
de S10 se aplica antes de losdescuentos de porcentajes totales. No incluye el impuesto a las ventas. Consulta en la tienda para
obtener detalles.
Redemption Instructions 	ssociate: At Tender menu, TOUCH Modify Transaction, TOUCH Kohl's Coupon. Scan barcode.
K O H L Smas de lo que esperas-
